checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The repository was created and pushed only after a dedicated publication contract and scope passed validation.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The public repository exists, main is the default branch, origin is exact, remote main contains the committed MVP, and the local branch tracks it.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No force push, workflow mutation, release, deployment, dependency, secret, production, billing, auth, or database operation occurred.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Pre-push scans found no tracked environment files and no recognized credential or private-key patterns.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local publication changes are limited to the declared contract, scope, report, audit packet, and audit files.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The product suite passed 64 checks with zero failures before publication.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: No branch protection or required CI was configured under this publication-only contract.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The report records public visibility, direct initial publication, no deployment, and remaining protection and live-pilot risks.

findings.evidence: Remote main is public but has no verified branch protection or required CI checks.
findings.recommendation: Create a dedicated governance contract before enabling branch protection and CI requirements.

unresolved_risks: Branch protection and required CI are not configured.
A real provider apply-mode pilot remains pending.
